## Pull Request Template

<!-- IMPORTANT: Please review the CONTRIBUTING.md file before submitting your PR -->

## 📝 Description

<!-- Provide a clear description of the changes in this PR -->
<!-- Include any relevant issue numbers using "Fixes #123" or "Closes #123" -->

Changes proposed in this pull request:

-

## 🔗 Related Issue

Closes #(issue number)
Fixes #(issue number)
Related to #(issue number)

## 📋 Type of Change

Please delete options that are not relevant:

- [ ] 🐛 **Bug fix** (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ **New feature** (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 🔄 **Breaking change** (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📖 **Documentation update** (README, docs, comments)
- [ ] 🎨 **Code style update** (formatting, renaming)
- [ ] ⚡ **Performance improvement**
- [ ] 🧪 **Test coverage**

## ✅ Checklist

Before submitting your PR, please confirm:

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards (PEP 8)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code where necessary
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (if applicable)
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings/errors
- [ ] I have tested my changes thoroughly
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged/published

## 📚 Documentation Updates

- [ ] README updated (if user-facing changes)
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated (with entry under Unreleased)
- [ ] Docstrings added/updated (for code changes)
- [ ] Config example updated (if new config options)

## 🔍 Code Review Notes

<!-- For reviewers: Add any notes or concerns here -->

### Reviewer Checklist

- [ ] Code quality meets standards
- [ ] No security vulnerabilities introduced
- [ ] Changes are adequately tested
- [ ] Documentation is complete
- [ ] No breaking changes (unless intentional and documented)
